message:
feat(types): PAC-Bayes layout-selection math primitive (IMPL-20 / AAC-P1)

McAllester bound over 3 layout candidates; observation accumulator;
argmin-over-upper-bound selector. Alternative encoders (Superblock,
RLE) are follow-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
